name: Local News:War1
uniques: Only available <when number of [turns] is greater than [5]>

civilopediaText.text: Breaking:Military clash on our country's border has already resulted in 100 deaths!

name: Local News:War2
uniques: Only available <when number of [turns] is greater than [5]>

civilopediaText.text: Breaking: The casualties from the ongoing conflict in our country has surpassed 500!

choices.text: The enemy will surely fall before a fortress made of our blood

name: World News:War3
uniques: Only available <when number of [turns] is greater than [5]>

civilopediaText.text: Breaking: The total dies in that war reached 1,000. It is definitely one of the largest wars in recent history. The situation is not irreversible.

choices.text: We will fight to the last drop of blood!
